query:
SELECT 
  product_name,
  sheet_name,
  partner_buy_price,
  bundled_buy,
  partner_sell_price,
  bundled_sell,
  (partner_buy_price - bundled_buy) as price_diff
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items
WHERE bundled_buy IS NOT NULL 
  AND bundled_buy != partner_buy_price
  AND version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY ABS(partner_buy_price - bundled_buy) DESC
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  product_name,
  sheet_name,
  partner_buy_price,
  bundled_buy,
  partner_sell_price,
  bundled_sell,
  (partner_buy_price - bundled_buy) as price_diff
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items
WHERE bundled_buy IS NOT NULL 
  AND bundled_buy != partner_buy_price
  AND version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY ABS(partner_buy_price - bundled_buy) DESC
LIMIT 20;
